vocab.meaning: sự quan tâm đặc biệt (thường vì lợi ích cá nhân)
vocab.example: Professional athletes often have a vested interest in wearing high-performance watches to monitor their physiological data in real-time.

vocab.meaning: là hình mẫu điển hình cho
vocab.example: For many, a classic wristwatch epitomizes a person who values structure and order in their daily life.

vocab.meaning: cai nghiện kỹ thuật số/giảm bớt thời gian dùng thiết bị điện tử
vocab.example: I find wearing a traditional watch essential for a digital detox, as it prevents me from being lured into my phone every time I check the hour.

vocab.meaning: sự gắn kết/hài hòa về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: A watch is a crucial accessory for achieving aesthetic cohesion, tying together the formal elements of a business suit.
Having a timepiece on my wrist heightens my temporal awareness, making me much more conscious of how I allocate my working hours.
Some younger people argue that watches have become redundant in an era where digital clocks are ubiquitous on every screen.

vocab.meaning: đạt được/có được sự tôn trọng (từ người khác)
vocab.example: In certain high-stakes corporate environments, a sophisticated watch can help a junior executive command respect during negotiations.

vocab.meaning: vật gia bảo mang giá trị tình cảm
vocab.example: It is important to wear a watch if it serves as a sentimental heirloom, keeping the memory of a loved one alive through daily use.

vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm thông qua xúc giác (chạm, cảm nhận)
vocab.example: I prefer watches because of the tactile experience; the weight of the metal and the ticking sound provide a grounding sensation that a phone lacks.

vocab.meaning: biểu tượng của sự trưởng thành
vocab.example: In many cultures, receiving and wearing your first proper watch is considered a significant symbol of maturity and responsibility.
